memory_objects.title: Temperature is not truth

memory_objects.title: Ordered recovery windows earn recall only after bounded proof
memory_objects.summary: Observed across source receipts, fourth-wave eval proof, derived stats, and additive route hints: repeated stress recovery becomes durable memo context only when the ordered window stays bounded and the memory object remains downstream from stronger evidence.
